frontMatter.title: Simple REST API with Adonis JS
frontMatter.summary: On the last ADB meetup, we have a conversation about what framework we usually use in creating a REST API. Then, Adonis.Js is being mentioned. I know Adonis but haven't got a chance to test it, so let's test it now!

prev.title: Simple State Machine
prev.summary: After reading a bunch of unidirectional data flow, Cycle.js's MVI and this article about implementing MVI in Android by Hannes, I'm convinced that this is how I should write my code from now on.

next.title: Redux-Like State Management with Sealed Class in Kotlin
next.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed how your view should have its own model. We also have discussed how you can make a simple redux-like state machine in Kotlin.
